_orchestrator_comment: Execution backend. 'baremetal' runs commands directly on hosts via SSH (default if omitted). See cvs/core/README.md and docs/reference/configuration-files/cluster-file.rst for the full reference.
_user_comment: {user-id} resolves to the current login user at runtime. Replace with a literal username if you want to pin it.
_key_comment: Absolute path to the SSH private key. Same key is used for all nodes.
_head_comment: Head node. mgmt_ip MUST match one of the keys in node_dict. Head-only commands (MPI launches, result aggregation) target this node.
_env_comment: Custom environment variables exported on every host before each command. Use for PATH overrides, ROCm/UCX flags, etc.
_node_comment: Cluster member nodes keyed by public IP or hostname. Each key MUST be unique (JSON parsers silently dedupe duplicates); replace -1 / -2 suffixes with your real IPs or hostnames. Add or remove entries to scale to N nodes.
_vpc_comment: vpc_ip is the address reachable from other nodes in the cluster. Set equal to the public IP if there is no separate VPC.
